examples: In Oliver Twist, he traces an orphan's progress from the workhouse to the criminal slums of London.
Then I told him about the wastage of food in the workhouse kitchen, and what I thought of it.
Also, I had my dinner from the workhouse table, and it was one of the biggest meals I have ever eaten.
The children who lived at the workhouse in Gressenhall were never expected to rise above their station in life.
The halfback had been a workhouse for the team, leading the league in total yards as recently as 2007.
